power.title: Power
power.noData: No power data yet. Upload a workout with a power meter to see your bests.

records.title: Distance Records
records.noData: No distance data yet. Upload a workout with a GPS track to see your records.

goals.title: Goals
goals.noGoals: No goals yet. Add one to get started!

complete.title: Complete goal
complete.outcomeNotePlaceholder: Did you reach the target? Any notes…

plan.title: Training plan
plan.noPlansDesc: Generate a plan to see your weekly schedule here.
plan.unlinkDesc: This will mark the workout as not completed. You can re-link it later.
plan.selectActivity: Choose the activity that completed this workout:
plan.noActivitiesOnDay: No activities recorded on this day.
plan.skipTitle: Why are you skipping this workout?
plan.skipFailed: Failed to mark workout as skipped
plan.generateWorkoutsDescription: Generate structured workouts for the upcoming days (today through 6 days from now). Rest days are skipped. Generated workouts appear in the Workouts tab, where you can upload them individually.
plan.generateWorkoutsNothing: No upcoming workouts to generate this week.

generate.aiDescPlaceholder: e.g. I’m training for a 160km gran fondo in June…

regenerate.title: Regenerate plan
regenerate.confirmDesc: This replaces all workouts that haven't been completed yet. Completed workouts are kept.

deleteWorkout.title: Delete workout?
deleteWorkout.desc: This permanently removes this planned workout.

profile.title: Profile
profile.name: Name
profile.hrZonesHint: Set your max HR above, then use “Populate from max HR” to generate default zones — or add them manually.
profile.powerZonesHint: Set your FTP above, then use “Populate from FTP” to generate default zones — or add them manually.
profile.syncZonesReconnect: Please disconnect and reconnect {name} to enable zone sync.
profile.syncZonesNoData: No zones found in {name}. Make sure power zones are configured in the {name} app and try reconnecting.
profile.exportDesc: Download a ZIP archive containing your profile and all uploaded FIT files.
profile.deleteAccountDesc: Permanently delete your account and all associated data.
profile.deleteAccountDialogDesc: This is irreversible. Your account and all data — including activities, goals, training plans, and all connected service integrations — will be permanently deleted immediately. This cannot be undone, even by administrators.
profile.providerError: Could not connect {name}. Please try again.

provider.disconnectDesc: Do you also want to delete all activities imported from {name}? This cannot be undone — deleted activities and their data will be permanently removed.
provider.disconnectedWithDelete: All imported activities have been deleted.
provider.notConfigured: {name} credentials are not configured on this server.
provider.notConfiguredDesc: The server does not have {name} credentials set up. Ask your server administrator to configure the {name} integration.
provider.wahooDeviceOnly: Hide activities not from a Wahoo device

about.title: About
about.desc: openkoutsi is an open-source endurance training companion. It lets you upload and analyse workouts from FIT files or Strava, track fitness metrics like CTL, ATL and TSB over time, manage heart rate and power zones, set goals, and generate personalised training plans — all from a self-hosted instance you control.

llm.title: AI / LLM
llm.desc: Connect your own LLM (e.g. a local {ollama} instance or an OpenAI-compatible API) to enable workout analysis and AI plan generation. All calls are proxied through the server — your API key is encrypted at rest and never sent to your browser.
llm.baseUrlHint: OpenAI-compatible endpoint, e.g. {ollamaUrl} for Ollama or {openaiUrl}
llm.serverRestricted: The server administrator has restricted LLM servers to this list.
llm.apiKeySet: API key is configured on the server.
llm.apiKeySetHint: Leave blank to keep current key, or type a new one to replace it.
llm.apiKeySecurityTitle: How is my API key stored?
llm.apiKeySecurityBody: Your API key is encrypted server-side using AES-256 (Fernet) with a key derived from your user ID via HKDF-SHA256. It is never returned to the browser after being saved — the server decrypts it in-memory only when making LLM requests on your behalf. All LLM calls are proxied through the backend, so your key and request data never leave your self-hosted instance.
llm.configured: LLM configured — workout analysis and AI plan generation are enabled.
llm.mixedContent: Mixed content warning: this page is served over HTTPS but your LLM URL starts with http://. The server will attempt server-to-server requests, but if your LLM is on localhost it must be reachable from the server process.

analysis.title: Analysis
analysis.autoAnalyzeDesc: Automatically generate AI coaching analysis when a workout is uploaded or synced. Requires an LLM configured by your team administrator.
analysis.autoTrainingStatusDesc: Automatically generate a daily training status overview on the dashboard after uploads and syncs. Requires an LLM configured by your team administrator.
